# CatInsurance.co.nz — NZ Cat Insurance Comparison

## About
CatInsurance.co.nz is New Zealand's independent cat insurance comparison and information service. We compare the 6 main NZ cat insurance providers and provide guidance to help Kiwi cat owners find the right cover for their cats.

## Purpose
- Compare NZ cat insurance providers side by side
- Provide breed-specific insurance guidance for NZ cat owners
- Explain coverage types, policy terms and claims processes
- Help cat owners understand costs, exclusions and how to compare

## Key Facts About NZ Cat Insurance (2025)
- Only 1 in 10 NZ cat owners have cat insurance (vs 1 in 5 dog owners)
- NZ cat insurance starts from $11/month (Southern Cross AcciPet, accident only)
- Comprehensive cat insurance costs $20–$65/month depending on age and breed
- 6 main providers: SPCA Pet Insurance, Southern Cross, Petcover, Cove, Pet-n-Sur, PD Insurance
- Maximum annual limit: $25,000 (SPCA Pet Insurance, Cove)
- Fastest claims: SPCA Pet Insurance (1–2 business days)
- Highest entry age: Pet-n-Sur (11 years 11 months)
- Only 100% reimbursement: PD Insurance ($0 excess, 0% co-pay)
- Hereditary conditions: covered by SPCA, Petcover, Cove, Pet-n-Sur, PD Insurance (NOT Southern Cross)

## Provider Summary

### SPCA Pet Insurance
- Badge: Fastest Claims
- From: $20/month
- Annual limit: $25,000
- Claims: 1–2 business days (fastest in NZ)
- Unique: Covers non-chronic pre-existing conditions (only NZ insurer)
- Hereditary: Yes
- Entry age: Up to 9 years

### Southern Cross Pet Insurance
- Badge: Most Comprehensive
- From: $11/month (AcciPet)
- Annual limit: $2,500–$15,000
- Claims: 10 days
- Unique: Optional dental, wellness, consultation extras; 6-week free kitten cover
- Hereditary: NO (not suitable for pedigree breeds)
- Entry age: Under 7 years (PetCare plan)

### Petcover
- Badge: Top Rated NZ
- From: $20/month
- Annual limit: $20,000
- Claims: 5 days (90% of claims)
- Unique: 40+ years NZ experience, 93% claims paid, Feefo Trusted Award
- Hereditary: Yes
- Entry age: Up to 9 years

### Cove
- Badge: Best Value Online
- From: $19/month
- Annual limit: $25,000
- Claims: Online processing
- Unique: Covers hereditary AND congenital conditions; no sub-limits per condition
- Hereditary: Yes (hereditary + congenital)
- Entry age: Any age (AcciPet)

### Pet-n-Sur
- Badge: NZ Owned & Longest Running
- From: $20/month
- Annual limit: $18,000
- Claims: 14 days (99.3% of claims)
- Unique: HIGHEST entry age in NZ (11 years 11 months); 100% NZ owned; 19+ years operating
- Hereditary: Yes (if presenting after age 3)
- Entry age: Up to 11 years 11 months

### PD Insurance
- Badge: 100% Reimbursement
- From: $22/month
- Annual limit: $20,000
- Claims: 5–7 business days
- Unique: $0 excess, 0% co-payment — 100% reimbursement on eligible claims; no age loadings
- Hereditary: Yes
- Entry age: Up to 9 years

## Coverage Types Available in NZ

1. Accident Only — from $11/month. Road accidents, falls, swallowed objects, bite wounds, poisoning.
2. Accident & Illness — from $19/month. All accidents plus infections, digestive, respiratory, urinary conditions.
3. Comprehensive — from $25/month. Full cover including hereditary conditions, cancer, specialist care.
4. Dental Care — add-on from ~$8/month. Procedures, extractions, dental disease.
5. Wellness Care — add-on from ~$10/month. Vaccinations, annual check-ups, preventive treatments.
6. Senior Cat Cover — from $35/month. Specialist cover for cats 7+ including chronic conditions.

## Cat Breeds Covered
Domestic Shorthair, Ragdoll, Maine Coon, Persian, British Shorthair, Bengal, Siamese, Burmese, Russian Blue, Scottish Fold, Devon Rex, Abyssinian

## Key NZ Cat Insurance Concepts

**Excess:** Amount you pay before insurer pays. Range: $0 (PD Insurance) to $1,000 (Cove Major plan).

**Co-payment:** Percentage of each claim you pay after excess. Range: 0% (PD Insurance) to 30% (Southern Cross max).

**Annual limit:** Maximum insurer pays per policy year. Range: $2,500 (Southern Cross min) to $25,000 (SPCA/Cove).

**Pre-existing condition:** Condition present/symptomatic before policy start. Excluded by all NZ insurers EXCEPT SPCA Pet Insurance (covers non-chronic pre-existing if symptom-free for qualifying period).

**Stand-down period:** Waiting period before illness claims accepted. Typically 21 days for illness; no stand-down for accidents; 90 days–6 months for cruciate conditions.

**Hereditary conditions:** Genetic conditions common to certain breeds (HCM, PKD, etc.). Covered by all NZ insurers EXCEPT Southern Cross.

## Location Coverage
Auckland, Wellington, Christchurch, Hamilton, Tauranga, Dunedin, Palmerston North, Nelson, and all NZ locations.

## Contact
Website: https://catinsurance.co.nz
Email: hello@cover4you.co.nz
Operated by: Cover4You (NZ-owned)

## Disclaimer
CatInsurance.co.nz is an independent comparison service. We are not a licensed financial adviser. Information is general in nature. Always read the PDS before purchasing. We may receive referral fees from insurers — this does not affect our independent comparisons.
